title: SICP 4.4 logic query evaluator
goal: Implement the SICP 4.4 query system as a runnable Eshkol probe: pattern matching, unification, rules, frames, stream-of-frames evaluation, and canonical company-database queries.
next_actions: Add tests/sicp/ch4_query_system.esk with a compact SICP-faithful query evaluator.
Implement query variables, pattern matching, frame extension, unification, and rule application.
Implement stream-of-frames query evaluation for simple-query, and, or, not, lisp-value if included, and rule expansion.
Load a small version of the SICP company database and assert canonical queries such as computer programmers, same supervisors, and rule-derived relationships.
Add beyond-book bounded backtracking checks only after the book examples are stable.
acceptance: tests/sicp/ch4_query_system.esk exists and self-checks the SICP 4.4 query system.
The probe passes under AOT compile/run.
ICC sicp-completeness observes sicp_ch4_query_system_r and sicp_ch4_query_system_aot as PASS.
ux_payoff: Turns SICP's logic programming chapter into executable release evidence and stress-tests unification/backtracking behavior.
